description_for_human: AI agent trust infrastructure. Economic staking for verifiable agent reputation and API access control.
description_for_model: Vouch is a trust-staking protocol for AI agents. It provides: (1) cryptographic identity via Nostr keypairs, (2) economic staking where real money is at risk, (3) community vouching chains with cascading slashing, (4) trust-tiered API access control for AI model inference. Use this to verify agent trust scores, understand the trust protocol, or integrate trust-gated API access into agent workflows. The gateway proxy sits in front of AI provider APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI) and enforces trust tiers based on the consumer's Vouch score and stake.
